subtasks.description: Generate SQL to calculate current month spend and 3-month rolling average by vendor/category. Include variance percentage and absolute difference for anomaly detection.
Reconcile spend results with historical patterns. Classify each anomaly as normal_variance, concerning, or critical based on variance thresholds and business context rules.

plan.cost_rationale: Two subtasks required: (1) sql_gen (mid-tier) to compute current spend vs. 3-month average with variance calculations—requires window functions and conditional logic across time periods; (2) cross_recon (mid-tier) to classify anomalies against variance thresholds and business rules. The classification logic (normal_variance/concerning/critical) is part of the reconciliation agent's decision-making, not a separate policy check. Mid-tier suffices for both as the SQL is moderately complex (rolling average + variance) and the classification uses standard heuristics without extreme inference needs.

output.sql: WITH monthly_spend AS (SELECT vendor_name, DATE_TRUNC('month', invoice_date) AS month, SUM(amount_usd) AS monthly_total FROM invoice_facts WHERE invoice_date >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '4 months') GROUP BY vendor_name, DATE_TRUNC('month', invoice_date)), with_rolling AS (SELECT vendor_name, month, monthly_total, AVG(monthly_total) OVER (PARTITION BY vendor_name ORDER BY month ROWS BETWEEN 3 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING) AS rolling_3mo_avg FROM monthly_spend), current_vs_avg AS (SELECT vendor_name, month AS current_month, monthly_total AS current_spend, rolling_3mo_avg, (monthly_total - rolling_3mo_avg) AS abs_difference, CASE WHEN rolling_3mo_avg IS NULL OR rolling_3mo_avg = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ROUND(((monthly_total - rolling_3mo_avg) / rolling_3mo_avg) * 100, 2) END AS variance_pct FROM with_rolling WHERE month = DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)) SELECT vendor_name, current_month, current_spend, rolling_3mo_avg, abs_difference, variance_pct, CASE WHEN variance_pct IS NULL THEN 'insufficient_history' WHEN ABS(variance_pct) <= 20 THEN 'normal_variance' WHEN ABS(variance_pct) <= 50 THEN 'concerning' ELSE 'critical' END AS anomaly_classification FROM current_vs_avg ORDER BY ABS(COALESCE(variance_pct, 0)) DESC
